header.title: Documentation
header.subtitle: Everything you need to know about AmplifiX
header.description: Comprehensive guides, API references, and tutorials to help you get the most out of our AI-powered corporate communications platform.

quick-start.title: Quick Start Guide
quick-start.description: Get up and running with AmplifiX in under 10 minutes

content.text: Welcome to AmplifiX! This guide will help you get started with our AI-powered corporate communications platform in just a few simple steps.

items.title: Create Your Account
items.description: Sign up for AmplifiX and choose your plan
items.details: Visit our pricing page and select the plan that best fits your needs. You can start with a free trial to explore all features.

items.title: Set Up Your Profile
items.description: Configure your company information and branding
items.details: Add your company logo, brand colors, and key messaging to ensure all communications align with your brand identity.

items.title: Import Your Contacts
items.description: Upload your media and investor contact lists
items.details: Use our CSV import tool or integrate with your existing CRM to sync your contact database automatically.

items.title: Create Your First Campaign
items.description: Launch your first AI-powered communication campaign
items.details: Use our guided campaign builder to create press releases, investor updates, or social media campaigns with AI assistance.

setup.title: Account Setup
setup.description: Configure your AmplifiX account for optimal performance

content.text: Proper account setup is crucial for getting the most out of AmplifiX. Follow these detailed steps to configure your account correctly.
Your company profile forms the foundation of all your communications. Make sure to provide accurate and complete information.

items: Company name and legal entity information

content.text: Upload your brand guidelines to ensure AI-generated content maintains consistency with your brand voice and style.

authentication.title: Authentication
authentication.description: Learn how to authenticate with the AmplifiX API

content.text: AmplifiX API uses API keys for authentication. All requests must include a valid API key in the Authorization header.

items.title: Navigate to Settings
items.description: Go to your dashboard and click on 'Settings' in the sidebar

items.title: API Management
items.description: Select 'API Keys' from the settings menu

items.title: Generate Key
items.description: Click 'Generate New API Key' and copy the key securely

endpoints.title: API Endpoints
endpoints.description: Complete reference for all AmplifiX API endpoints

content.text: The AmplifiX API provides RESTful endpoints for managing campaigns, content, contacts, and analytics.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of campaigns to return (default: 20, max: 100)

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by campaign status: draft, active, completed, paused

parameters.name: channels
parameters.description: Distribution channels: email, social, press_release, investor_update

examples.title: Initialize SDK
Create Campaign
Initialize SDK
examples.code:
from amplifix import AmplifiX

client = AmplifiX(
    api_key='your-api-key',
    environment='production'
)

examples.title: Generate Content
examples.code:
content = client.content.generate(
    type='press_release',
    topic='quarterly_earnings',
    data={
        'revenue': '$10.2M',
        'growth': '15%',
        'period': 'Q3 2024'
    }
)

print(content.title)
print(content.body)

items.question: How do I get started with the API?
items.answer: First, generate an API key from your dashboard settings. Then, make your first request to the /v1/campaigns endpoint to retrieve your campaigns. Check our Quick Start guide for detailed steps.

items.question: What are the rate limits for the API?
items.answer: Rate limits depend on your plan: Startup (100 requests/hour), Growth (1,000 requests/hour), Enterprise (unlimited). Rate limit headers are included in all responses.

items.question: Can I customize the AI-generated content?
items.answer: Yes! You can provide custom prompts, brand guidelines, and style preferences. The AI will adapt its output to match your specific requirements and brand voice.

items.question: How do webhooks work?
items.answer: Webhooks allow real-time notifications when events occur in your account. Configure webhook URLs in your settings to receive notifications for campaign completions, content approvals, and more.

items.question: Is there a sandbox environment for testing?
items.answer: Yes, we provide a full sandbox environment that mirrors production functionality. Use sandbox API keys to test integrations without affecting your live campaigns.
